details.test: Task 1: Register for beginner weekend evening workshop next month under $40
Task 2: Choose annual membership under $120 with exhibit participation and most benefits
Task 3: Add three low-cost events of different types this month to schedule
Task 4: Create 'Night Downtown' collection with highly rated photos
Task 5: Build wishlist of three beginner cameras under $600 from recent gear guides
Task 6: Create forum account and post tripod question under $150 for landscapes
Task 7: Save a note about weekly meeting at or after 6:30 PM and rename it
Task 8: Reserve the longer course under $200 that starts soonest
Task 9: Sign up for monthly newsletter with specific photography topics
Task 10: Request mentorship from wildlife specialist accepting beginners
